description:
House in the tropics | Home Office 

Adjacent to the main entrance - the home office was actually an after thought. It sits below a 18ft cantilever - thus with no columns it enjoys seamless views on 3 sides with a clear glass facade. 
Lush heliconias wrap the home office from the outside. 

The custom printed window blinds are by @vrikshapresentationport 
The beautiful artwork is by @in.sanctum 
Jaisilmer marble for the flooring is sourced from @cosmofloor 

Design team - @dinesh____27 @sriram.natrajan @jaisrinivas_jade 

Landscape design - @mawidesign.india @mallisaravanan @ajith_kumar_saravanan 

Photography - @phosartstudio 

#architecture #architecturaldesign #archlovers #archdaily #indian #indianhome #indianhomedecor #homedecor #decor #residentialdesign #tropical #tropicalmodern #tropicalmodernism #entrance #design
